member.name: T:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi
member.summary: This class handles all requests you can make to the MusixMatch API.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize an API connector with your API key.
member.param: Your API Key.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose Connector.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackingUrlGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Tracking.TrackingUrlGet,System.Action{System.String},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get the base url for the tracking script With this api you’ll be able to get the base url for the tracking script you need to insert in your page to legalize your existent lyrics library. Read more here: https://developer.musixmatch.com/documentation/rights-clearance-on-your-existing-catalog In case you’re fetching the lyrics by the musiXmatch api called track.lyrics.get you don’t need to implement this API call.
member.param: The TrackingUrlGet object which contains the domain to return a tracking url for.
When the call to the API succeeds, return a string with the tracking url.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.CatalogueDumpGet(System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedCatalogue.Catalogue},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get the list of our tracks with the lyrics last updated information. Important: This method is only available for commercial plans.
member.param: When the call to the API succeeds, return the catalogues.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.ChartArtistsGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Chart.ArtistsGet,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedArtists.ArtistList}},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get top artists of a given country.
member.param: The ArtistsGet object which contains the filters to get the right artists.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the list with artists.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.ChartTracksGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Chart.TracksGet,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.TrackList}},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get a song chart of the top in a country.
member.param: The TracksGet object which contains the filters to get the right chart.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the list with tracks.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackSearch(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Track.TrackSearch,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.TrackList}},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Search for a track in the database.
member.param: The Search object with the filters to use for the request.
Action to run when getting the track succeeds, returns a tracklist.
Action to run when getting the tracklist failed, returns an error.
member.returns: A list with all the tracks that are returned based on your filters.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Track.TrackGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.Track},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get a track info from our database: title, artist, instrumental flag and cover art.
member.param: The Get object with the filters to use for the request.
Action to run when getting the track succeeds, returns a track.
Action to run when getting the track failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackSubtitleGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Track.TrackSubtitleGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedSubtitle.Subtitle},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Retreive the subtitle of a track. Needs Commercial Plan.
member.param: The SubtitleGet object which contains the filters to get the right song subtitles.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the subtitle object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackLyricsGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Track.TrackLyricsGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedLyrics.Lyrics},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get lyrics with a track id.
member.param: The LyricsGet object which contains the filters to get the right song lyrics.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the Lyrics object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackSnippetGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Track.TrackSnippetGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedSnippet.Snippet},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get the snippet for a given track. A lyrics snippet is a very short representation of a song lyrics.It’s usually twenty to a hundred characters long and it’s calculated extracting a sequence of words from the lyrics.
member.param: The SnippetGet object which contains the filters to get the right song snippet.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the Snippet object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackLyricsPost(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Track.TrackLyricsPost,System.Action{System.String},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Submit a lyrics to our database. It may happen we don’t have the lyrics for a song, you can ask your users to help us sending the missing lyrics.We’ll validate every submission and in case, make it available through our api. Please take all the necessary precautions to avoid users or automatic software to use your website/app to use this commands, a captcha solution like http://www.google.com/recaptcha or an equivalent one has to be implemented in every user interaction that ends in a POST operation on the musixmatch api.
member.param: The LyricsPost object containing the song id and the lyrics you want to upload.
When the call to the API succeeds, returns the lyrics uploaded (or nothing, this is not shown on the musixmatch doc page...)
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.TrackLyricsFeedbackPost(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Track.TrackLyricsFeedbackPost,System.Action{System.String},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: This API method provides you the opportunity to help us improving our catalogue. We aim to provide you with the best quality service imaginable, so we are especially interested in your detailed feedback to help us to continually improve it. Please take all the necessary precautions to avoid users or automatic software to use your website/app to use this commands, a captcha solution like http://www.google.com/recaptcha or an equivalent one has to be implemented in every user interaction that ends in a POST operation on the musixmatch api.
member.param: The LyricsFeedbackPost object which contains the filters to post the feedback for the correct lyrics and song.
When the call to the API succeeds, returns the uploaded feedback (or nothing, this is not shown on the musixmatch doc page...)
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.MatcherLyricsGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Matcher.MatcherLyricsGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedLyrics.Lyrics},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get the lyrics for track based on title and artist
member.param: The MatcherLyricsGet object which contains the filters to get the right song lyrics.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the Lyrics object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.MatcherTrackGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Matcher.MatcherTrackGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.Track},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Match your song against our database. In some cases you already have some informations about the track title, artist name, album etc. A possible strategy to get the corresponding lyrics could be: - search our catalogue with a perfect match, - maybe try using the fuzzy search, - maybe try again using artist aliases, and so on. The matcher.track.get method does all the job for you in a single call. This way you dont’t need to worry about the details, and you’ll get instant benefits for your application without changing a row in your code, while we take care of improving the implementation behind. Cool, uh?
member.param: The MatcherTrackGet object which contains the filters to get the right track.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the Track object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.MatcherSubtitleGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Matcher.MatcherSubtitleGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedSubtitle.Subtitle},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get the subtitles for a song given his title, artist and duration. Needs Commercial Plan.
member.param: The MatcherSubtitleGet object which contains the filters to get the right subtitle.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the Subtitle object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.ArtistGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Artist.ArtistGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedArtist.Artist},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get the artist data from our database.
member.param: The ArtistGet object which contains the filters to get the right Artist.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the Artist object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.ArtistSearch(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Artist.ArtistSearch,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedArtists.ArtistList}},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Search for artists in our database.
member.param: The ArtistSearch object which contains the filters to get the right Artists.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the ArtistList object with artists.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.ArtistAlbumsGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Artist.ArtistAlbumsGet,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedAlbums.AlbumList}},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get the album discography of an artist.
member.param: The ArtistAlbumsGet object which contains the filters to get the right Albums.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the AlbumList object with albums.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.ArtistRelatedGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Artist.ArtistRelatedGet,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.ReturnedArtists.ArtistList}},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get a list of artists somehow related to a given one.
member.param: The ArtistRelatedGet object which contains the filters to get the related artists.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the AlbumList object with albums.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.AlbumGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Album.AlbumGet,System.Action{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.Album},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Get an album from our database: name, release_date, release_type, cover art.
member.param: The AlbumGet object which contains the filters to get the album.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the Album object.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.

member.name: M:MusixMatch_API.MusixMatchApi.AlbumTracksGet(MusixMatch_API.APIMethods.Album.AlbumTracksGet,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{MusixMatch_API.ReturnTypes.TrackList}},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: This api provides you the list of the songs of an album.
member.param: The AlbumTracksGet object which contains the filters to get the tracks.
When the call to the API succeeds, return the List with tracks.
Action to run when the call failed, returns an error.
